vocab.example: Please write a clear subject line so the client understands the email quickly.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy viết dòng tiêu đề rõ ràng để khách hàng hiểu nhanh nội dung email.

vocab.example: Can you forward this email to the whole team?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể chuyển tiếp email này cho cả nhóm không?

vocab.example: Please bcc our manager on this email.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng bí mật đồng gửi email này cho quản lý của chúng ta.

vocab.example: I need to chase up the client for a reply.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi cần đôn đốc khách hàng để có câu trả lời.

vocab.example: Always proofread your email before you hit send.
vocab.example_vi: Luôn đọc soát lỗi email trước khi bạn nhấn gửi.

vocab.example: Please keep replying in the same email thread.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng tiếp tục trả lời trong cùng một chuỗi email.

vocab.example: List the main updates as bullet points.
vocab.example_vi: Liệt kê các cập nhật chính dưới dạng gạch đầu dòng.

vocab.example: Make sure the recipient's email address is correct.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy chắc chắn địa chỉ email của người nhận là chính xác.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Nam, did you send the report to the client yet?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Not yet. I'm still working on the subject line.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Make it clear, like 'Weekly Progress Report - Project Alpha'.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Good idea. Should I forward the previous email too?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yes, forward it so they have the full email thread.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Do I need to bcc our manager on this one?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yes, please. And don't forget to proofread before sending.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I'll write the main points as bullet points to keep it short.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Perfect. Who is the main recipient again?

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Mr. Tran from the client side. I'll chase up if he doesn't reply by Friday.

questions.q: What does Linh suggest for the subject line?
options: A clear title like the project name

questions.q: Why does Nam forward the previous email?
options: So the client has the full email thread

questions.q: What will Nam do if Mr. Tran doesn't reply by Friday?

shadowing: Did you send the report to the client yet, or are you still working on it?
Please forward the email and make sure to bcc our manager.
I always proofread my emails before sending them to a client.
Could you write the main points as short bullet points for me?
I'll chase up the recipient if there's no reply by Friday.
